query: SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."出貨狀態"') as shipping_status, JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."訂單狀態"') as order_status, JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."訂單處理狀態"') as order_process_status FROM orders WHERE rawData IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user VDyW8BBNx15QJxW.root --database DN8ihETPKNPmGxAqBwYu7X --execute SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."出貨狀態"') as shipping_status, JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."訂單狀態"') as order_status, JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."訂單處理狀態"') as order_process_status FROM orders WHERE rawData IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;
